profile.bioText: I am a second-year undergraduate at NIBM, currently completing my Higher National Diploma (HND) and transitioning into my final degree year. I specialize in bridging the gap between clean code, intelligent systems, and user-centric software architecture.

projects.title: Moviestream / CineVault
projects.description: A premium movie database and streaming platform built from the ground up to provide a 100% ad-free cinematic experience for users.

projects.title: Wahera (Mobile App)
projects.description: The official companion Android application for Moviestream, actively being developed using Android Studio to bring seamless streaming to mobile devices.
